config.note: honest FIRST committed iPhone Settings floor — real iPhone 17 Pro Max (en/CN) full Settings read-only drill-down, n=5, single process, clean-HDMI cell, post-#99/#100 stack (round 0 ran at harness 2434d09, rounds 1-4 at baa6274; #101 between them is docs-only, code-identical). task_completion_rate=0.0 is DETERMINISTIC and forensically attributed, not noise: the REQUIRED root row 操作按钮 (ACTION_BUTTON) is missing in all 5 rounds (rounds 0-2 zero tap attempts, rounds 3-4 two failed taps each; per-round reports list it search_absent in rounds 0-3) — the #99 dead-band + in-app-search fixes are insufficient live, so root coverage never completes and the root_coverage_complete terminal honestly fails every round. Precedent for committing a 0.0 completion floor: the a11y loop-1 snapshot. Real work stays visible: action_success_rate=0.883, root_pages_coverage=0.88 (12-14 of 17 roots entered per round; 蜂窝网络 device_unavailable + 钱包与 Apple Pay blocked, both policy-exempt), recoveries=14, strategy_switches=39, expected_state_coverage=0.525. Round 4 (run_2026_06_12_18_54_24_233950) ended early on a traversal-stopping exception (report limits_hit contains 'exception'; observed live as a PicoKVM stream-open RuntimeError) — kept, honest variance. Forensics for the next ratchet: Camera entered 5/5 for the first time on iPhone (the #99 dead-zone fix partially works; the pre-fix n=5 aggregate had zero Camera tap attempts); 蜂窝网络 tap failed 5/5 on page_id mismatch (new anomaly, under investigation). Caveats: vlm_enabled=false records only the harness --vlm flag — the run's host env had VLM escalation enabled (vlm_action_coverage=0.181, vlm_calls=101, triggers low_confidence/target_missing/verify_unknown), so a VLM-off candidate will read as a vlm_action_coverage drop against this floor; scroll_success_rate=0.110 is the known iPhone swipe-fling physical weakness (no reliable precise wheel on iPhone), not a regression signal. Generator: GLASSBOX_PHONE_MODEL=iphone_17_pro_max uv run python -m skills.regression.computer_use_success_rate run-ios-settings --rounds 5 --drill-down --language en --region CN --keep-going --out artifacts/computer_use_success_rate/iphone_floor_n5_post99/floor_candidate.json --artifact-root artifacts/computer_use_success_rate/iphone_floor_n5_post99/rounds --report-dir /tmp/glassbox-ios-settings-benchmark-post99. final_state visible_texts/elements scrubbed per the public-fixture convention before commit.
